name: Arizona Jewelry & Pawnbrokers
description_short: Arizona Jewelry & Pawnbrokers is a family-owned pawn shop in Phoenix offering gold jewelry, firearms, tools, and collateral-based loans with fair pricing and honest appraisals.
description_long:
Arizona Jewelry & Pawnbrokers is a family-owned pawn shop located at 1804 W Camelback Rd #2, Phoenix, AZ 85015, operating as a trusted community resource for both pawning and purchasing valuable items. The shop has built its reputation over years of service, with long-term customers noting consistent operations since at least 2005. The business positions itself as a reliable alternative to traditional lending for customers needing quick cash or those seeking quality secondhand goods.

The shop offers a range of services centered on collateral-based transactions and retail sales. They buy, sell, and pawn gold jewelry, firearms, tools, and other valuable items. Customers can complete transactions using multiple payment methods including cash, credit cards, and mobile payment options. The staff provides appraisals and pricing guidance as part of their transaction process, emphasizing transparency in valuations.

Arizona Jewelry & Pawnbrokers distinguishes itself through claimed commitment to fair pricing and honest customer treatment. The website emphasizes organized store layout, well-lit displays, and a clean interior designed for comfortable browsing. Owners Chris and Dennis are mentioned by name as providing personalized service. The business highlights its community presence and loyal customer base, with positive reviews citing fair prices and friendly staff interactions.

However, the customer review section reveals significant inconsistency in service quality. While several customers praise fair pricing and friendly service, others report being refused service, receiving incorrect pricing information, and experiencing rude staff behavior. One detailed negative review specifically mentions a staff member described as "rude as hell" and unwilling to purchase DVDs. This pattern suggests operational variability or potential staff training issues that contradict the website's claims of exceptional service and respect for all customers.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Family-owned operation with established community presence since at least 2005
Multiple payment methods accepted including cash, credit cards, and mobile payments
Clean, well-organized interior with proper lighting and displays for merchandise browsing
Fair jewelry pricing recognized by long-time customers and regulars
Fast and transparent transaction process for pawning and purchases
Named owners (Chris and Dennis) personally involved in operations
Wide product selection including gold jewelry, firearms, and tools
cons: Inconsistent customer service quality with documented refusals to serve customers and rude staff interactions
Significant variance in pricing information accuracy, with customers reporting being given wrong prices
Mixed reviews indicate some staff members lack respect and professionalism despite company claims
Service limitations observed with certain item categories (e.g., one review mentions refusal to buy DVDs)
Website claims of 'exceptional service' and 'treating every customer with respect' contradicted by negative customer experiences
best_for: Customers seeking quick cash via collateral loans for jewelry, firearms, or tools
Buyers looking for secondhand gold jewelry and quality used merchandise
Long-time customers already familiar with specific staff members
Those needing flexible payment options and transparent appraisals
diagnosis: Arizona Jewelry & Pawnbrokers is best for customers seeking quick collateral-based loans or quality secondhand merchandise who have prior positive experience with the shop or specific staff members. The main caveat is significant inconsistency in service delivery—while the business emphasizes fair pricing and respect, multiple reviews document instances of refused service, rude staff, and pricing inaccuracies, suggesting customers should verify service standards before relying on this location.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
